headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $93
summary: Citigroup  analyst Joanne Wuensch   maintains Zimmer Biomet Holdings (NYSE:ZBH) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $95 to $93.

headline: Zimmer (ZBH) Up 3.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Zimmer (ZBH) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: 3 Healthcare Stocks That Fall Short
summary: Healthcare companies are pushing the status quo by innovating in areas like drug development and digital health. But speed bumps such as inventory destocking have persisted in the wake of COVID-19, limiting growth. This has capped returns as the industry’s six-month gain of 1.2% has lagged the S&P 500’s 9.8% climb.
